SEAM:REVEAL_3D.purpose: hi-res prize object mount in reveal

SEAM:SIGNUP_ENDPOINT@claw.purpose: win email capture; PLAY/EXCAVATE/MINE crossover attach

SEAM:MODEL_POOL.purpose: callModel() router; t1/t2 bulk public, t3 voice; sensitive pins to t3

SEAM:LEADERBOARD@rps.purpose: compete streak submit + match-end board card + shared join

SEAM:LEADERBOARD@hub.purpose: public tabbed board (RPS/CLAW/POP) — anonymous reads of the spine

SEAM:PREVIEW@worker.purpose: server-side reader: extract + translate-to-English + edge cache

SEAM:PREVIEW@daily.purpose: reader overlay, preview-first credits, lazy key visuals

SEAM:PREVIEW@intelligence.purpose: reader overlay; EXCAVATE source links preview in-window

SEAM:KNOWLEDGE@worker.purpose: feed doorway: chunk + embed (own account) + knowledge_base writes, admin-gated

SEAM:KNOWLEDGE@intelligence.purpose: FEED panel: paste/link/file in, recall test, recent drops

SEAM:STUDYBOARD@worker.purpose: public shelf read: live + open-audience + opted-in only, safe fields

SEAM:STUDYBOARD@intelligence.purpose: board overlay, third MINE door, gate affordance, partner listing toggle, take bridge

SEAM:STUDIO@worker.purpose: content engine: manifest cut on cron, voice layer, admin routes, deploy archive

SEAM:STUDIO@intelligence.purpose: house renderer + download counter: paint-op templates, store-zip, three-ring reveal

SEAM:ARCHIVE@worker.purpose: back-issue shelf: public archive index + by-issue reader, published-only

SEAM:ARCHIVE@daily.purpose: the stand: folio opens the shelf, deep-linkable ?issue=NN

SEAM:ENDGAME@worker.purpose: the economy: rotating code, generic match rail, claims + tickets, treasury routes, 7-game registry

SEAM:ENDGAME@arcade-hub.purpose: treasury panel (staff-door, shared-origin session) + coming-to-the-floor band

SEAM:INTRO@arcade-hub.purpose: boot sequence: attract video, instant skip, watchdog + reduced-motion dissolve

SEAM:THUMB@cabinet.purpose: thumb wrestling cabinet: pure match core, drag + camera translators, spine + match rail

SEAM:CHESS@cabinet.purpose: chess cabinet: proven 0x88 core, tiered brain, THE Hand twice on the 3D table, hold-to-move + orbit

SEAM:ENDGAME@claw.purpose: the prize counter door: token gate, treasury prize connect, claim tickets

SEAM:ENDGAME@chess-cabinet.purpose: chess mints the key: three straight from the Hand reveals the treasury code

SEAM:DAILY_POV.purpose: doctrine as code: territories, tiered source registry, resist-list, stage prompts, momentum rubric, 12-slot edition template; consumed by pipeline/STUDIO/EXCAVATE

SEAM:DAILY_SPINE.purpose: lake-filler: CAPTURE 28 feeds + GDELT -> hash dedup -> embed -> FILTER (echo + t1 classify) -> CONNECT (clusters + mechanical momentum); runs before edition, failures never block publishing

SEAM:DAILY_COMPOSER.purpose: twelve from the lake: POV slot-filler (quotas + edge law) + six-format law + t3 INTERPRET/APPLY voice; legacy synthesis survives as fallback; shared publishEdition backlinks signals

SEAM:EXCAVATE.purpose: lake as recon surface: /excavate/lake semantic search (territory/tier/window filters) + /excavate/cluster (neighborhood + provenance thread to published DAILY stories); intelligence page feeds every synthesize from it

SEAM:DAILY_HEALTH.purpose: admin observability door: lake backlog depths, spine heartbeat, per-feed error history, edition provenance share, named flags

SEAM:EDITION_WATCHDOG.purpose: the alarm that did not exist: 06:00 ground-truth check on the edition row, not on a return value; DARK when nothing reached status=published or a row stalled at building, LEGACY when no item carried a signal_id and the fallback carried the paper; mails over Resend to ALERT_EMAIL and speaks even when it cannot read the lake — health that only an admin JWT can see is how DAILY went dark for seven days

SEAM:FIELD_RAIL.purpose: the law before the provider: EXCAVATE returns two rails that never blend — lake rows carry tier, captured_at, cluster and momentum, field results carry title/url/summary/source and nothing else, so a scrape cannot be rendered as archive; no provider attached by design, FIELD_API_KEY + a fetch in fieldRail() is the whole attach

SEAM:PROMOTE.purpose: how the lake grows by hand: /excavate/promote hashes on the capture fingerprint, takes an analyst-assigned tier, enters at raw and rides the newest-first drain into embed/filter/connect; momentum.promoted carries who, when, provider and the query that surfaced it, merged (never replaced) by every downstream stage

SEAM:PROPOSE.purpose: the lake writes its own themes: recurring clusters (weeks touched, span, breadth, source count, paper provenance) go to t3 for a thesis in the DAILY voice — one batched call, KV-cached 24h; stat and bar are computed from recurrenceRollup and never written by the model, every card declares provenance:lake, and nothing publishes itself. SEAM:PROMOTE run the other direction: there a human hands the lake a signal, here the lake hands a human a theme

SEAM:RECURRENCE.purpose: the lake's long memory: recurring themes ranked by weeks touched, span, breadth and paper provenance; cluster pulse on the cluster door

SEAM:TELEMETRY@intelligence.purpose: the featured surface drinks from its own lake: every curated card already carried the exact query it hands OpenAlex, so it hands the same string to /excavate/lake and gains a second evidence rail — public academic depth plus what Unsurfaced actually captured. The bar was `bar:84`, a literal the live path returned unchanged; it is now the mean momentum of the matching signals over the rubric's own published 0-30 ceiling, and no lake evidence draws no bar at all. Optional and silent: any failure leaves the public lenses untouched

SEAM:TELEMETRY.purpose: the face wears the engine: live lake counts off the public /daily/lake door as the masthead marquee

SEAM:ARCADE_ECON.purpose: run-it-back law: revealOk restart for joined players, fresh session token minted on next round start, arcade return door on the score card

note: planned seams live in /worker; they enter registry as they ship
